title: RelPack
description: The best PVP texture pack, available for 1.21.4 and 1.8.9! Somewhat WIP.
body:
A PVP resource pack that's meant for everything Minecraft! Whether you're comboing opponents in style or playing BedWars, this pack will be perfect!

Featuring a minimalistic and (somewhat) vibrant style for everything retextured. Also has funky short swords.

UPDATE PATH:
- Low fire
- Small gaps and totems
- Low shield
- More improvements for crystal PVP
- More items retextured
![Retextured items (Gallery for more)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6316273d36743c1e78fdeefdb7cfc735b42cf8b.png)
